commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a pending-timeout snapshot check to `waitForAgentJob`'s fallback timer before it falls through to pending-error or null handling.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, but not from a live run in this review: current main holds pending timeout snapshots and the outer wait timer only falls back to pending errors or null. The linked issue gives a concrete run-timeout scenario, but the PR still needs after-fix real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(gateway): check pending timeout snapshot in waitForAgentJob timer
target.body:
When a sub-agent run is force-killed by its run timeout, the wait timer callback in waitForAgentJob only consulted getPendingAgentRunError and ignored getPendingAgentRunTimeout. If the timeout snapshot arrived near-simultaneously with the wait timer expiry, the pending timeout was discarded and waiters resolved to 
ull - so the parent session never received a completion event.

Check pending timeout first in the wait timer callback so timeout-terminated sub-agent runs correctly notify the parent session.

## Verification
- Existing tests pass (server-methods: 117/117)
- Lint clean

Closes #89095
